name: Croron Mein Khel
overview: Croron Mein Khel is a Pakistani gameshow aired on BOL Entertainment.[1][2] Its first host was Nadia Khan.[3][4] It is one of the most famous gameshows in Pakistan. It is also known as CMK. Its slogan is "Kyunke yeh khel hai croron ka" (English: Because This Game is of Millions). It is now hosted by Maria Wasti.

trailers.title: Meera in Nadia Khan Show | Croron Mein Khel | 1st February 2019 | BOL Entertainment
